info.title: Material Issue & Return API
info.description: API documentation for Material Issue and Material Return modules. This API allows mobile developers to manage material issues and returns with full CRUD operations, stock validation, and return quantity tracking.

get.description: Retrieve a list of all material issues with optional filtering by workspace, site, and issue type.

parameters.name: issue_to_type
parameters.description: Filter by issue type (user or supplier)

post.description: Create a new material issue with items. Validates that sufficient stock is available for each material before creating.

issue_to_type: The issue to type field is required.
items.0.quantity: The quantity must be at least 0.01.

500.description: Internal server error or insufficient stock

example.message: Material Issue creation failed: Insufficient stock for material ID: 1. Available: 5, Requested: 10

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific material issue including all items and related data.

put.description: Update an existing material issue. Reverses previous stock impact and applies new stock deductions. Validates stock availability for new quantities.

500.description: Internal server error or insufficient stock

delete.description: Delete a material issue and reverse all stock impacts. This will restore the issued quantities back to stock.

post.summary: Get data for creating material issue
post.description: Retrieve materials, users, and suppliers needed for the material issue creation form.

parameters.name: workspace_id
parameters.description: Workspace ID (optional, uses active workspace if not provided)

message.example: Material Issue create data fetched successfully

post.summary: Get available stock for a material
post.description: Retrieve the current available stock quantity for a specific material at the current site.

material_id.description: Material ID to check stock for

site_id.description: Site ID (optional, uses active site if not provided)

get.description: Retrieve a list of all material returns with optional filtering by workspace and site.

post.description: Create a new material return linked to an existing material issue. Validates that return quantity does not exceed remaining issued quantity for each item.

issue_id: The issue id field is required.
items.1.quantity: Return quantity cannot exceed remaining issued quantity. Issued: 10, Already Returned: 3, Remaining: 7

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific material return including all items and related data.

put.description: Update an existing material return. Reverses previous stock impact and applies new stock additions. Validates return quantity limits.

delete.description: Delete a material return and reverse all stock impacts. This will deduct the returned quantities from stock.

post.summary: Get data for creating material return
post.description: Retrieve materials and issues needed for the material return creation form.

parameters.name: workspace_id
parameters.description: Workspace ID (optional, uses active workspace if not provided)

parameters.name: site_id
parameters.description: Site ID (optional, uses active site if not provided)

message.example: Material Return create data fetched successfully

post.description: Retrieve detailed information about a material issue including already returned quantities for each item. Used to calculate remaining returnable quantities.

issue_id.description: Material issue ID to get details for

bearerAuth.description: Enter your Bearer token (e.g., Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9...)

issue_to_type.description: Type of entity the issue is to

issue_to_id.description: ID of the user or supplier

created_by.description: User ID who created the issue
User ID who created the return

MaterialIssueWithReturns.description: Material issue with return tracking information for each item

MaterialIssueItemWithReturns.description: Issue item with return tracking information

already_returned_qty.description: Quantity already returned for this item

remaining_qty.description: Remaining quantity that can be returned

issue_to_type.description: Type of entity to issue to

issue_to_id.description: ID of the user or supplier

items.description: Array of material items to issue

quantity.description: Quantity to issue (must be > 0 and <= available stock)

issue_id.description: Material issue ID to return from

items.description: Array of material items to return

issue_item_id.description: Issue item ID to return from

quantity.description: Quantity to return (must be > 0 and <= remaining issued quantity)

issue_to_type: The issue to type field is required.
items.0.quantity: The quantity must be at least 0.01.
